ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "institution_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the institution the patient is associated with */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the patient record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" TEXT /* Identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the institution */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the institution */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the institution record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the institution record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test sample */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose sample was tested */,
  "institution_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the institution where the test was conducted */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physician who ordered the test */,
  "time_collected" TEXT /* Date and time the sample was collected */,
  "specimen_type" TEXT /* Type of specimen collected (e.g., nasal swab, blood) */,
  "time_completed" TEXT /* Date and time the test was completed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., POS, NEG) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the test and additional notes */,
  "matrix_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the matrix used in the test */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test conducted */,
  "test_method" TEXT /* Method used for the test */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* Status of the test (e.g., Pending, Completed, Cancelled) */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was conducted */,
  "test_cost" TEXT /* Cost of the test */,
  "referring_physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referring physician */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the test record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the test record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("physician_id") REFERENCES physicians ("physician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_referring_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("referring_physician_id") REFERENCES physicians ("physician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "physicians" (
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each physician */,
  "physician_name" TEXT /* Name of the physician */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the physician */,
  "institution_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the institution the physician is associated with */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the physician */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the physician record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the physician record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("physician_id")
)
